title: قرار رقم 75  لسنة 2016: بشأن تحديد الرسوم والتكاليف التي يستوفيها المُرخّص لهم نظير مشاركة المواقع الداخلية للهاتف المتحرّك في الدولة

provisions.title: المرسومبقانوناتحادي رقم (3)لسنة 2003
provisions.content: منالمرسومبقانوناتحادي رقم (3)لسنة 2003المُشارإليه، وعدمالقيام بأيفعل من شأنهالإخلال بتلكالأحكاموالضوابط.المادة3 -يُعملبهذا القرارمن تاريخصدوره ويُنشرفي الجريدةالرسمية.صدرفي دبي بتاريخ29 سبتمبر 2016م.محمدأحمدالقمزيرئيسمجلسالإدارةنشرهذا القرار فيعدد الجريدةالرسمية رقم 610ص 1005.DETRMINATIONNO (1) OF 2016Chargesfor Indoor Mobile Site SharingTABLEOF CONTENTS1- LegalBackground...........................................................................32-Defintions.....................................................................................33-History........................................................................................44- TheDetermination............................................................................55-EffectiveDate...............................................................................66-Acknowledgement...........................................................................61-Legal Background1.1Article 12 of Federal Law by Decree No. (3) of 2003 as amended (“theLaw”) established the TRA as the, “... competent body to oversee thetelecommunications sector in the State and all Licensees...”1.2Article 14 (1) and (2) of the Law specifically grants to the TRA the power toissue regulations, instructions, decisions and rules regulating thefollowing:a)“... tariffs, charges and fees levied by Licensees...”;b)“... anything related to the use and Interconnection of TelecommunicationsNetworks and Telecommunications Services provided by the Licensees, co-locationand sharing of infrastructure by such Licensees, including the specialconditions for costs of such Interconnection, access, site-sharing, time-scalesand principles for negotiations and completion of agreements between concernedentities in relation to the foregoing matters”.1.3Articles 2.14 and 2.15 of the TRA’s Mobile Site Sharing InstructionsVersion 1.0 (the “Mobile Site Sharing Instructions”), stipulate thatthe charges levied between Licensees for site sharing “... shall be basedon reasonable and efficiently incurred costs.”2-Definitions2.1 Theterms, words and phrases used in this Determination shall have the same meaningas are ascribed to them in the Telecommunications Law unless this Determinationexpressly provides for otherwise, or the context in which those terms, words andphrases are used in this Determination require it. For the puposes of thisDetermination:2.1.1Access Provider shall mean a Licenseewho provides Indoor Mobile Site Sharing to the Access Seeker.2.1.2Access Seeker shall mean a Licensee whoobtains Indoor Mobile Site Sharing from the Access Provider.2.1.3Licensees shall mean Etisalat and EITC.Language such as “a Licensee” shall be construed as to refer toeither Etisalat or EITC as the context so requires.2.1.4Turnkey Cost shall mean the suppliercosts related to the establishment of an indoor mobile site and any work ormaterials costs incurred by the Access Provider in installing any relatedequipment or components.2.1.5Engineering Supervision Activitiesshall mean the activities carried out by the Access Provider relating tooverseeing the engineering aspects of indoor mobile site projects.2.1.6Lead Operator’s Fee shall mean acharge for the management activities that the Access Provider performs beforeand after the implementation of an indoor mobile site project. This excludes theactivities covered by Engineering Supervision Activities.2.1.7ISS Operation and Maintenance Fee Shallmean the fee charged by the Access Provider to the Access Seeker for activitiesrelated to Operations and Maintenance of an indoor mobile site.2.1.8ISS upgrade Fee shall mean the feecharged by the Access Provider to the Access Seeker for the upgrade of an indoormobile site.2.1.9ISS Upgrade Lead Operator’s Feeshall mean a charge for the management activities performed by the AccessProvider before and after the implementation of an upgrade of an indoor mobilesite project.3.History3.1 Anextended period of negotiations between the Licensees failed to result inagreement on the charges for indoor mobile site sharing. As a consequence, theTRA decided to intervene to establish charges for both active and passive indoormobile site sharing.3.2 On 13March 2016, the TRA issued a Closed Consultation Document entitled “indoorMobile Site Sharing Charges” which invited comments from Licensees on theTRA’s proposed approaches to deriving the charges and defining therelevant cost inputs.3.3 On 16May 2016, the TRA exchanged for further review and comment the initial responsesreceived from Licensees on the Consultation.3.4Having given due consideration to the comments received from the Licensees, theTRA hereby makes the following Determination.4.The Determination4.1Having considered the provisions of Federal Law by Decree No. (3) of 2003, asamended, and the TRA’s Regulatory Framework, taking into consideration theinputs provided by the Licensees, the TRA hereby determines the Mobile SiteSharing Charges applicable to indoor mobile sites as follows.Sharingof Active Indoor Mobile Sites4.2 Thecharges for the sharing of active indoor sites shall be as set out in Table 1below. For the avoidance of doubt, these charges shall apply to all indoormobile sites in the UAE irrespective of the location of the site in which indoorsite sharing occurs.Table1: Charges for sharing of active indoor sitesItemChargeTypeof ChargeISSProject Cost50% ofthe total Turnkey Cost plus Engineering Supervision Activities mark-up of 6% tobe paid by the Access Seeker.ISSProject Cost =50%*(1.06* Turnkey Cost)One- offchargeLeadOperator’s Fee1.75% ofthe total Turnkey Cost to be paid by the Access Seeker.One- offchargeISSOperation and Maintenance Fee2.5% ofISS Project Cost to be paid by the Access Seeker.In theevent of an upgrade shared by the Access Seeker, the ISS Operation andMaintenance Fee shall be adjusted accordingly to reflect the ISS UpgradeCost.AnnualchargeISSUpgrade fee50% ofthe ISS Upgrade Cost to be paid by the Access Seeker.One- offchargeISSUpgrade Lead Operator’s Fee1.75% ofthe ISS Upgrade Cost to be paid by the Access Seeker.One-offchargeSharingof Passive Indoor Mobile Sites4.3 Theannual charges for sharing passive indoor sites shall be AED 236 perantenna.4.4 Theminimum amount the Access Seeker shall pay to the Access Provider for sharing apassive indoor mobile site shall be AED 15,000 per project per year.Royaltycharges4.5 Anyapplicable revenue-based royalty charges shall be added to the charges specifiedabove in relation to both active and passive sites.Retrospectiveapplication4.6 ThisDetermination and the charges for site sharing which are referenced herein shallbe applied retrospectively to cover all relevant existing indoor mobile sitesharing arrangements, and shall remain in force until the TRA determinesotherwise.5.Effective Date5.1 ThisDetermination shall become effective upon issuance.6.Acknowledgement6.1 EachLicensee shall notify the TRA in writing of receipt of this Determination withinone (1) business day of the date it is received.
